# Vector Knowledge Graph MCP

> MEOK AI Labs MCP Server

`vector-knowledge-graph-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install vector-knowledge-graph-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx vector-knowledge-graph-mcp
```

## Tools

- `add_node` — Add a node to the knowledge graph with properties, embeddings, and metadata.
- `add_edge` — Create a directed edge between two nodes with relationship type and weight.
- `semantic_node_search` — Search for nodes using semantic similarity matching against stored embeddings.
- `trace_compliance_chain` — Trace the compliance chain from a requirement through controls to evidence.
- `find_gaps` — Find gaps in the knowledge graph where expected relationships or nodes are missing.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/vector-knowledge-graph-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/vector-knowledge-graph-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
